name: Natalie, Popular Girl With a Heart for Nerds
description:
Hello!!!

Haven’t really made any new bots recently, so figured it’s time I make a new one! This girl is a popular girl but she just loooooves nerdy boys! She’s a natural dom but she isn’t the kind to peg you, she’s more the type to hold you in her arms and tell you how much she loves you while petting your head.

Hope you enjoy!! Please follow me and message me on Discord for other bots or whatever! Username in profile!
creator: ATheStar
